name: Close CRM API
what_it_does: Close CRM REST API — programmatic access to leads, contacts, opportunities, activities, calls, and email sequences in the sales-optimized CRM built for inside sales teams with built-in calling and email sequence automation.
use_cases: Agents enriching Close CRM leads with company research and adding notes before sales rep follow-up
Activity automation — agents logging AI-generated call summaries and meeting notes to lead timelines in Close
Lead scoring — agents querying Close lead data, analyzing activity patterns, and updating custom fields with scores
Sequence enrollment — agents automatically enrolling leads in email sequences based on triggering behaviors
Pipeline reporting — agents querying Close opportunity data for custom sales reporting dashboards and forecasts
not_for: Enterprise CRM needs — Close is optimized for SMB inside sales; use Salesforce for enterprise complexity
Non-sales use cases — Close is purpose-built for sales; use HubSpot for marketing + CRM combined workflows
Field sales teams — Close is optimized for inside sales (phone, email); use a mobile-first CRM for field reps
best_when: You need to automate inside sales workflows for a team that relies heavily on calls and email sequences with a developer-friendly API.
avoid_when: You need enterprise-grade customization or non-sales use cases — Close's strength is specifically inside sales automation.

auth.notes: API key via HTTP Basic auth (key as username, empty password). Key scoped to the account with the key owner's permissions. Keys are created per user in account settings. No OAuth for third-party integrations.

pricing.paid_tiers: Startup: $49/month/3 users; Professional: $299/month/3 users; Enterprise: $699/month/5 users
pricing.notes: 14-day free trial. API access on all plans. Calling minutes included in Professional and Enterprise. Annual billing saves ~20%.

performance.rate_limits: 100 req/s; burst allowed; specific endpoints have lower limits; bulk endpoints available

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Well-documented REST API with clear examples. Error responses include field-level details. Rate limit headers included. Bulk endpoints with async operations for large data sets. Python SDK helps with auth and pagination.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Lead creation is not idempotent — duplicates can be created without checking. Updates by ID are idempotent. Activity creation is not idempotent. Merge duplicate leads endpoint available for cleanup.
known_agent_gotchas: Lead and Contact are separate entities in Close — agents must understand the Lead > Contact hierarchy
Custom activities require custom activity type setup before API use — can't create arbitrary activity types on the fly
Email sequences (Smart Views enrollment) require specific plan tier — not available on Startup plan
Bulk import endpoints are async — agents must poll for import job completion
Phone number formatting must include country code — E.164 format required for calling features to work

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 Type II. GDPR compliant. Basic auth with API key — simple but not scope-granular. Key has full account access tied to user permissions. US data processing. Audit logs available.
